docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-15-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-14-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUED FOR AN ADDITIONAL 6 MOS.
PAYMENTS, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 10/20/03 AT 1:30PM AND THE CASE WILL BE CONTINUED FOR AN ADDITIONAL 6 MONTHS.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-20-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-15-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
TRIAL RESET TO APR-14-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF MAR-04-2003 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-14-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-20-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 CASE SETTLED. DEFT, PINANGAY TO PAY $20 PER MONTH BEGINNING MAY 1, 2003 & ON THE 1ST OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL TOTAL JUDGMENT OF $2450 & $38.50 COST IS PAID. IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,450.00 FILED BY MARIANS AS TO DEFENDANT PINANGAY, GLORIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-04-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-07-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-07-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 CASE CONTINUED FOR ANOTHER 6 MONTHS.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-07-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-07-2006 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 FOR PROGRESS REPORT ON PAYMENT.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-14-2004, CONTINUED BY COURT TO APR-07-2005 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 CONTINUE FOR ANOTHER 6 MONTHS.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT PINANGAY, GLORIA DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
